item.title: Bookmarklets
item.description: What are bookmarklets? They are small snippets of JavaScript code that are in the form of a bookmark. Since it is basically a JavaScript program, it is natively available in all major browsers, including Mozilla Firefox & Chromium-based browsers. We’ll look at how to create bookmarklets in Firefox. How to Create Bookmarklets In Mozilla Firefox, open your bookmarks toolbar by pressing CTRL + B, you can then right-click and click on “Add Bookmark…”
